entry.title: IDC W15P7T10DD414 (P00006) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
A. TO ADD NEW CLAUSE FAR 52.203-16 PREVENTING PERSONAL CONFLICTS OF INTEREST.
B. TO DELETE PREVIOUS SUBCONTRACTOR ADDITION/DELETION POLICIES.
C. TO REMOVE INDIVIDUAL NAMES AND CONTACT INFORMATION FROM THE BASIC CONTRACTS.
D. TO REMOVE REQUIREMENT FOR APPROVAL FROM CONTRACTING OFFICER FOR OVERTIME/TRAVEL (APPROVAL BY COR).
E. TO CLARIFY THE SERVICE CONTRACT ACT COMPLIANCE REQUIREMENT.
F. TO CLARIFY THE SMALL BUSINESS PARTICIPATION REPORT SUBMISSION REQUIREMENT.
G. TO REMOVE PREVIOUS REQUIREMENTS FOR APPROVALS OF PERSONNEL CHANGES.
H. TO CLARIFY THE OPTION TO EXTEND TASK ORDER CLAUSE.
I. TO UPDATE AND CLARIFY ATTACHMENT 0002 LABOR CATEGORY DESCRIPTIONS.
J. TO REMOVE VOUCHER WORKBOOK REQUIREMENT AND UPDATE ATTACHMENT 0021.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
